total_program_budget_usd.rationale: Plan states $25M-$100M envelope, modelling at high anchor. Low reflects stated minimum; high allows modest 20% overrun for political/legal escalation on a novel planetary-namespace application.

hsm_capex_usd.rationale: Plan source text gives explicit $5M-$10M range for mandatory internal HSM procurement; midpoint as base.

year1_breakeven_registration_volume.rationale: Plan states 5,000 break-even; inferred quantity with high uncertainty driven by OpEx and price spread. Asymmetric high reflects upside risk if base OpEx lands at $10M ceiling.

string_contention_contingency_usd.rationale: Plan source text gives explicit $10M-$20M range for string-contention defense, legal, lobbying; midpoint as base.

avg_price_per_domain_usd.rationale: Plan suggests $50-$200 premium-gTLD band benchmarked against recent ICANN launches with similar political profile; base midpoint within the stated range.

year1_base_opex_usd.rationale: Plan's stated $5M-$10M Year 1 OpEx for 5 FTE loaded cost, cloud DNS hosting, compliance audits, outsourced ZSK signing; midpoint as base.

expected_year1_registrations.rationale: High-uncertainty bottom-up estimate. Low reflects niche space-industry adoption only; base matches break-even target; high allows speculative crypto/branding adoption. Early new-gTLD Year 1 volumes typically span 1k-25k.

revenue_pledge_fraction.rationale: Explicit pinned plan commitment: 50% of net registry revenue to Mars environmental protection fund.

observed_mos_compliance_rate.rationale: Plan commits to >=95% High-Freshness compliance gate. No named Risk/Issue forecasts a miss, so base=target. Bernoulli_gate avoids triangular peak-mass=0 pathology; pass=0.7 reflects realistic execution risk for a novel 100kbps Mars endpoint under 60-minute sync.

registration_volume_buffer_fraction.rationale: Plan demands 30% buffer above break-even before activating pledge; suggested 20-40% sensitivity range from financial-model spread on price and volume.
